name: Maple Glazed Ham Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 Fully cooked ham steak (1 to 1-1/2 inches thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slash the edges of the ham.
2. Sprinkle with powdered cloves.
3. Place in a shallow baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
5. Arrange figs and bananas around the ham in the pan.
6. Brush the ham with the maple syrup, lemon juice, and butter mixture.
7. Heat an additional 15 minutes, brushing again with the sauce.
8. Makes 4 to 5 servings.
